calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-26-2015 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-26-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for Entry of Judgment.
Department 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

Sheila Shahriraypour, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff CAPITAL ONE (USA), N.A.
No appearance on behalf or by Defendant JULIA RICHARDSON.
Alexandra Sakime sworn and examined on behalf of the Plaintiff.
After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff and against Defendant as follows:
Principal $3,986.28
Pre-Judgment Interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $290.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $4,276.28
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-29-2014 Set For Trial On Jan-26-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
